reference_image.critical_note: The reference image IS the checkbox. Match its style exactly.

shape_profile.description: A checkbox is a compact, roughly square toggle. Small relative to buttons/panels. A single box with room for a check-mark or fill indicator inside.
required_visual_features: interior space for a checkmark or fill indicator
compact size — smaller than other interactive UI elements

unchecked.description: Unchecked (empty) state: the box with no indicator inside.

checked.description: Checked state: same box, now with a check-mark or filled indicator in a style matching the source art.

modifications.indicator: add check-mark or fill inside the box

forbidden_content: stripping or altering any backgrounds, frames, or borders that are visible in the source
changes to the outer box silhouette between states
priority_rules: DIMENSIONS MUST match the reference image exactly
Outer box SILHOUETTE must be identical between checked and unchecked
The check indicator must match the source art style
